title: CVE-2026-3662 - Wavlink WL-NU516U1 adm.cgi usb_p910 command injection

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3662 - Wavlink WL-NU516U1 adm.cgi usb_p910 command 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/08
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*adm.cgi*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
